LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GORDON RIDDIOUGH'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE CGC-16-554702 WITH CASE CGC-16-554693 IS GRANTED. THE TWO CASES ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES. THIS CASE (CGC-16-554693) WILL BE THE LEAD CASE AND ALL FURTHER FILINGS WILL BE IN THIS CASE ONLY. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976 =302/HK

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the balance of case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-02-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-10-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2017 Set For Trial On Feb-05-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-554702 WITH CASE CGC-16-554693
Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT GORDON RIDDIOUGH'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE CGC-16-554702 WITH CASE CGC-16-554693 is GRANTED. The two cases are consolidated for all purposes. This case (CGC-16-554693) will be the lead case and all further filings will be in this case only. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/hk
